card.name: Adaptive Evolution

actions.name: Chimera Strike
actions.effects: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage for every two friendly Mutation upgrades attached to models within 3" of this model.

extraction_notes: Card includes two additional rules not captured in abilities/actions schema:
1. During the start phase of turn 1, attach a Mutation upgrade to up to two friendly Chimera models without an attached Mutation upgrade.
2. After a Mutation upgrade is discarded from a friendly Chimera model, another ally within 3" without a Mutation upgrade may attach the discarded upgrade.
The Chimera Strike action is granted as a trigger on 'variable' actions (indicated by the double slash symbol //)
